content_of_post_to_comment: I'm looking at a bunch on Amazon and they look good, but don't know that they'll stand the test of time. I've had my KSafes for 6+ years, the motors on both are going out but still sorta working. Has anyone been happy with their non KSafe time safes? Let me know, thanks!
comment: Six years is actually a pretty solid run for something with a motor constantly cycling. I've found the weak point on a lot of these gadgets isn't the locking mechanism but the electronics and batteries. A simpler design with a reliable timer can sometimes outlast the feature-heavy ones. Curious if anyone has tried a non-KSafe model for several years rather than just a few months?
